definitions: The period during which adolescents reach sexual maturity.
The process of physical changes through which a child's body matures into an adult body capable of sexual reproduction.

examples.text: While we often talk about puberty’s effect on the body, what gets overlooked are the fascinating changes that happen in the brain.
examples.explanation: 展示 puberty 在对比身体与大脑变化时的用法。

source.text: What sex ed doesn’t tell you about your brain - Shannon Odell

examples.text:
While we often talk about puberty’s
effect on the body, what gets overlooked are the fascinating
changes that happen in the brain. I’ve been sent here to talk 
to you about puberty.

source.text: What sex ed doesn’t tell you about your brain - Shannon Odell
